title: Crispy German Salad
description: A German-inspired salad with crispy fried onions and fresh herbs.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet, heat 1-2 tbsp of oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add sliced German-Style Sausage (if using) and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove sausage from skillet and set aside.
4. Add crispy fried onions to skillet and cook until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
5. In a large bowl, combine mixed greens, chopped parsley, and chopped dill.
6. In a small bowl, whisk together German Mustard and vinaigrette.
7. Pour dressing over salad and toss to combine.
8. Top salad with cooked sausage (if using) and crispy fried onions.
